---
title: "About me"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
format: 
  html:
    theme: lux
    css: styles/styles.css
image: sujan.jpg
about:
  template: solana
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://x.com/BalamiSujan
    - icon: ResearchGate
      text: ResearchGate
      href: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Sujan-Balami
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/sujanbalami
    - icon: Google Scholar
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=xm8CpYMAAAAJ&hl=en
---

::: contact
**Sujan Balami PhD**

*Postdoctoral Research Fellow*

Plant Ecology Lab

Gyeongkuk National University, Andong city, Republic of Korea
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: about-extra
### Professional summary

I am a researcher in community ecology with a focus on belowground microbial processes, ecosystem functioning, and restoration ecology. My expertise includes environmental metagenomics, bioinformatics, computational ecology, and large-scale ecological and microbiome data analysis. I apply ecological statistics, multivariate analysis, and computational approaches to investigate microbial community dynamics, nutrient limitations, and ecological recovery in disturbed ecosystems.

### Education

University of South Bohemia, Ceske Budejovice \| Czech Republic \| PhD in Botany

Tribhuvan University, Kathmandu \| Nepal \| MSc in Botany

### Experience

Research Fellow \| Chinese Academy of Sciences \| China

Teaching Assistant \| Tribhuvan University, Kathmandu \| Nepal

Research Assistant \| CzechGlobe, Czech Academy of Science \| Czech Republic

Lab Technician \| University of South Bohemia, Ceske Budejovice \| Czech Republic

### Computational Skills

- R, Python, Bash

- Metagenomics & Amplicon Analysis

- Linux/HPC Computing

- Statistical Modeling

- Reproducible Workflows

- Git/GitHub
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: contact2
### Contact

E-mail: balamisujan\@gmail.com \| sujanbalami\@xtbg.ac.cn

Address: Menglun Town \| Mengla County \| Yunnan Province \| China
:::
